creator: freebsd-ports@andre.rikkertdekoe.nl
text:
solved:

[root@monitor ~]# pkg info | grep kibana 
kibana7-7.14.0                 Browser based analytics and search interface to ElasticSearch
[root@monitor ~]# pkg info | grep node |  grep 14.17
node14-14.17.6                 V8 JavaScript for client and server
[root@monitor ~]# service kibana status
kibana is running as pid 840.
[root@monitor ~]#

thanks
